source: DHC-6 Series 300 MMEL Rev 11 (Transport Canada); POH PSM 1-63-1A; HBFO-002 QRH. Operator must maintain an approved MEL derived from the MMEL.
disclaimer: This reference is for TRAINING and STUDY purposes only. Always consult your operator-approved MEL before dispatch. This app does not replace an approved MEL.

items.crew_procedure: PF uses serviceable ASI. Check FCTM for single-ASI procedures.
PF uses serviceable altimeter. Reduce to VFR only if required.

items.placard: One AI inoperative — IFR not authorised
items.crew_procedure: VFR only. PF uses serviceable AI.
Monitor altitude and rate of climb/descent using altimeter only.
items.maintenance_action: Placard and log defect. Rectify within 10 days.

items.crew_procedure: Do not conduct approaches requiring DME. VOR/NDB or GPS approaches only.
items.maintenance_action: Placard and log. Rectify within 10 days.

items.crew_procedure: Apply AFM Supplement 19. VMC rises to 70 KCAS / 68 KIAS. Manual feather required. Supplement 37 performance data NOT applicable.
items.maintenance_action: Invoke Supplement 19. Placard cockpit and log. MMEL Category C: 10 consecutive calendar days.
items.reference: POH Supplement 19; MMEL DHC-6 Cat C

items.crew_procedure: Aircraft is NOT DISPATCHABLE with fire detection inoperative. Rectify before flight.
items.maintenance_action: Immediate rectification required. Category A item.

items.crew_procedure: Aircraft is NOT DISPATCHABLE. Rectify before flight.
Single generator operations. Review electrical load shedding. Night operations limited. Check operator SOP for specific restrictions.
items.maintenance_action: Placard and log. Rectify within 3 days.

items.crew_procedure: NOT DISPATCHABLE without operable main battery.
Visually confirm aileron trim tab is in neutral position before each take-off.
items.maintenance_action: Placard. Visual check before flight per crew procedure. Rectify within 10 days.

items.placard: Boost pump No.1 inoperative — affected side
items.crew_procedure: Select STDBY BOOST PUMP EMER ON for affected side. Monitor fuel pressure. Refer to QRH Boost Pump CAS procedure.
items.maintenance_action: Placard and log. Activate standby pump. Rectify within 3 days.
items.reference: QRH Boost Pump #1 CAS; MMEL DHC-6

items.placard: Fuel quantity gauge inoperative — dip check required
items.crew_procedure: Physically dip-check inoperative tank fuel quantity before each flight. Use dipstick procedure.
items.maintenance_action: Placard. Dipstick check mandatory per crew procedure.

items.placard: Hydraulic pump inoperative — hand pump only
items.crew_procedure: Flap extension via hand pump only. Allow extra time. Gear free-fall if required. Refer to QRH Low Hydraulic Pressure.
items.maintenance_action: Placard. Verify hand pump operative. Log defect. Rectify within 10 days.
items.reference: QRH Low System Hydraulic Pressure; MMEL DHC-6

items.crew_procedure: Flight into known icing NOT AUTHORISED. Do not dispatch if icing conditions exist or forecast along route.
items.maintenance_action: Immediate rectification. Category A for flight into known icing.

items.crew_procedure: PF uses serviceable pitot/ASI. Avoid icing conditions if possible.
items.maintenance_action: Placard. Log defect. Rectify within 3 days.
